name: pi-lab
description: Claude Code parity for pi-coding-agent: plan mode, sub-agents, TodoWrite, and MCP client for Crow integration
author: kh0pp

scripts.test:extensions: fail=0; for f in extensions/*.ts extensions/*/index.ts; do case "$f" in extensions/todo.ts|extensions/subagent/index.ts) echo "=== $f === SKIP (imports @mariozechner/pi-ai; works at pi runtime but jiti standalone hits the pi-ai CJS exports gap)"; continue;; extensions/plan-mode/index.ts|extensions/web/index.ts|extensions/critic/index.ts|extensions/tournament.ts) echo "=== $f === SKIP (value-imports pi internals/pi-tui; resolvable only through pi's runtime alias map)"; continue;; esac; echo "=== $f ==="; ./bin/pi-extension-check "$f" || fail=1; done; exit $fail
